name: Lacuna Bar Seam
author: Lacuna
description: A breathing pulse separator that brackets a cluster of bar widgets (the lacuna mark).

barWidget.description: Vertical breathing pulse used to separate bar widget clusters by space.

schema.label: Gap width (px)
schema.description: Horizontal space the seam reserves — the separation between clusters.

schema.label: Seam break (px)
schema.description: Height reference for the centered pulse mark.

schema.label: Breathing glow
schema.description: Slow accent glow that breathes in the gap.

schema.label: Color profile
schema.description: Override the global Lacuna color profile for this widget.
